headline: Gorman-Rupp (GRC) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Gorman-Rupp (GRC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +38.78% and +5.60%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
